title: Public image match from open web bulletin
summary: Matched the case photo to a public community bulletin mirror with timestamped sighting context.
rationale: Provider returned a visually similar public image result.
Source URL is attributable and reviewable by an analyst.

title: Public post reusing case photo
summary: Open post includes the same image and a recent public location reference for analyst review.
rationale: Result came from a public post that can be independently reviewed.
Source metadata is captured for lead triage.
